Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

Syntax of the simply-typed lambda calculus as a multisorted signature based on the actegorical development.
Thanks to that development, the inductive and the coinductive calculus are exposed in parallel.
The Church numerals are developed independently from the choice for inductive or coinductive syntax.
The entire development is only done for the base category [HSET] and thus profits from having inhabitants of the objects
and having functions as morphisms.

There is a sketch of how the Church numeral for infinity in the coinductive calculus could be obtained.

A point-free development for an abstract base category in place of [HSET] is found in STLC_actegorical_abstractcat.v.
That file includes a completed construction of Church numeral infinity.

Written by: Ralph Matthes, 2024 (reusing beginnings from STLC_alt.v)

 *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Lists.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCoalgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Groupoids.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Chains.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Cochains.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Structures.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SigmaMonoids.
Require UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SortIndexing.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedBindingSig.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSorted_alt.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSorted_actegorical.
Require UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedMonadConstruction_coind_actegorical.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.ContinuitySignature.InstantiateHSET.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.
Require UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.STLC_alt.


Local Open Scope cat.

Section A.

Context (sort : hSet) (arr : sort → sort → sort).

Local Definition Hsort : isofhlevel 3 sort := MultiSortedBindingSig.STLC_Hsort sort.

Let sortToSet : category := SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort.
Let sortToSetSet : category := SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort.
Let sortToSet2 : category := SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort.

Let projSortToSet : sort -> sortToSetSet := MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet sort Hsort.
Let projSortToSetvariable : (sort → sort) → sortToSet2 := projSortToCvariable sort Hsort HSET.
Let hat_functorSet : sort -> HSET ⟶ sortToSet := MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet sort Hsort.
Let sorted_option_functorSet : sort → functor sortToSet sortToSet := MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet sort Hsort.

Local Definition BCsortToSet : BinCoproducts sortToSet := SortIndexing.BCsortToSet sort Hsort.
Local Definition BPsortToSet : BinProducts sortToSet := SortIndexing.BPsortToSet sort Hsort.

Local Definition TsortToSet : Terminal sortToSet := SortIndexing.TsortToSet sort Hsort.
Local Definition TsortToSet2 : Terminal sortToSet2 := SortIndexing.TsortToSet2 sort Hsort.

Local Definition BPsortToSetSet : BinProducts sortToSetSet := SortIndexing.BPsortToSetSet sort Hsort.


(** Some notations *)
(* Local Infix "::" := (@cons _).
Local Notation "[]" := (@nil _) (at level 0, format "[]").
Local Notation "a + b" := (setcoprod a b) : set. *)
Local Notation "s ⇒ t" := (arr s t).
Local Notation "'Id'" := (functor_identity _).
(*Local Notation "a ⊕ b" := (BinCoproductObject (BinCoprodSortToSet a b)). *)
(* Local Notation "'1'" := (TerminalObject TerminalSortToSet). *)
Local Notation "F ⊗ G" := (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToSetSet F G).


sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
F, G: sortToSet2
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: sort
pr1 (# (pr1 (functor_compose F G)) f) s =
pr1 (# (pr1 G) (# (pr1 F) f)) s


sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
F, G: sortToSet2
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: sort
pr1 (# (pr1 (functor_compose F G)) f) s =
pr1 (# (pr1 G) (# (pr1 F) f)) s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
F: sortToSet2
s: sort
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
arg: pr1
  (pr1 (functor_compose F (projSortToSet s)) ξ)
# (pr1 (functor_compose F (projSortToSet s))) f arg =
pr1 (# (pr1 F) f) s arg


sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
F: sortToSet2
s: sort
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
arg: pr1
  (pr1 (functor_compose F (projSortToSet s)) ξ)
# (pr1 (functor_compose F (projSortToSet s))) f arg =
pr1 (# (pr1 F) f) s arg

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Local Definition STLC_Sig : MultiSortedSig sort := STLC_Sig sort arr.

(** the canonical functor associated with STLC_Sig *)
Definition STLC_Functor_H : functor sortToSet2 sortToSet2 :=
  MultiSorted_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor' sort Hsort SET
    TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig.

(** the functor of which the fixed points are considered *)
Definition STLC_Functor_Id_H : functor sortToSet2 sortToSet2 :=
  SubstitutionSystems.Id_H sortToSet BCsortToSet STLC_Functor_H.

(** the canonical strength associated with STLC_Sig *)
Let θSTLC := MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength' sort Hsort SET
               TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig.

Definition ctx_ext (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : sortToSet
  := sorted_option_functorSet s ξ.
(*  := pr1 (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET (s :: [])) ξ. *)

(** the sigma-monoids for wellfounded and non-wellfounded syntax for STLC *)
Let σind : SigmaMonoid θSTLC := MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort STLC_Sig.
Let σcoind : SigmaMonoid θSTLC := MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort Hsort STLC_Sig.

Section IndAndCoind.

  Context (σ : SigmaMonoid θSTLC).

  (** the functor representing the syntax for STLC *)
  Definition STLC_gen : sortToSet2 := SigmaMonoid_carrier θSTLC σ.

  (** the type of STLC terms in a context of a sort *)
  Definition STLC_gen_ctx_sort (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : UU
    := pr1 (pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen ξ) s).

  (** variable inclusion for syntax for STLC *)
  Definition STLC_eta_gen : sortToSet2⟦Id,STLC_gen⟧ := SigmaMonoid_η θSTLC σ.

  Definition STLC_eta_gen_natural (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧) :
    # Id f · pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ' = pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ · # (pr1 STLC_gen) f
    := nat_trans_ax (STLC_eta_gen) ξ ξ' f.

  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
f · pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ' =
pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ · # (pr1 STLC_gen) f

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
pr1 f u · pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ') u =
pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ) u
· pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u

arr: sort → sort → sort

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
pr1 f u · pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ') u =
pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ) u
· pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u

    apply (nat_trans_eq_weq HSET _ _ (STLC_eta_gen_natural' ξ ξ' f)).
  Qed.

σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
elem: pr1 (pr1 (pr1 ξ) u)
pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ') u (pr1 f u elem) =
pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u
  (pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ) u elem)

  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
elem: pr1 (pr1 (pr1 ξ) u)
pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ') u (pr1 f u elem) =
pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u
  (pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_gen ξ) u elem)

    apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (STLC_eta_gen_natural'_pointwise ξ ξ' f u)).
  Qed.

  (** the algebra maps (the "domain-specific constructors") for STLC *)
  Definition STLC_tau_gen : STLC_Functor_H STLC_gen --> STLC_gen  := SigmaMonoid_τ θSTLC σ.

  (** the individual sorted constructors for application and lambda-abstraction *)

  Definition app_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted (s t : sort) : functor sortToSet2 sortToSet2 :=
    (post_comp_functor (projSortToSet (s ⇒ t)) ⊗ post_comp_functor (projSortToSet s))
      ∙ (post_comp_functor (hat_functorSet t)).

  (** this old-style definition coincides with [STLC_alt.v] *)
  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s, t: sort
app_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted s t =
STLC_alt.app_source sort arr s t

  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s, t: sort
app_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted s t =
STLC_alt.app_source sort arr s t

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition app_source_gen_newstyle (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 :=
    BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToSet
      (functor_compose STLC_gen (projSortToSet (s ⇒ t) ∙ hat_functorSet t))
      (functor_compose STLC_gen (projSortToSet s ∙ hat_functorSet t)).

  Definition app_source_gen (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 :=
    ContinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctor.hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
      BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET (arity sort STLC_Sig (inl (s,, t))) STLC_gen.

s, t: sort
app_source_gen s t = app_source_gen_newstyle s t

           (projSortToSet (s ⇒ t) ∙ hat_functorSet t)))
     f) u (pr1 arg)

s, t: sort
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
arg: pr1 (pr1 (pr1 (app_source_gen s t) ξ) u)

           (projSortToSet s ∙ hat_functorSet t))) f) u
  (pr2 arg)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** The application constructor *)
  Definition app_map_gen (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦app_source_gen s t,STLC_gen⟧ :=
    CoproductIn _ _ (Coproducts_functor_precat _ _ _ _ (λ _, _)) (ii1 (s,,t)) · STLC_tau_gen.

  Definition app_map_gen_natural (s t : sort) (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧)
    : # (pr1 (app_source_gen s t)) f · pr1 (app_map_gen s t) ξ' = pr1 (app_map_gen s t) ξ · # (pr1 STLC_gen) f
    := nat_trans_ax (app_map_gen s t) ξ ξ' f.

σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s, t: sort
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
pr1 (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s t)) f) u
· pr1 (pr1 (app_map_gen s t) ξ') u =
pr1 (pr1 (app_map_gen s t) ξ) u
· pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u

· pr1 (pr1 (app_map_gen s t) ξ') u =

  Qed.


  Definition lam_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted (s t : sort) : functor sortToSet2 sortToSet2 :=
    pre_comp_functor (sorted_option_functorSet s)
      ∙ post_comp_functor (projSortToSet t) ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorSet (s ⇒ t)).

  (** this old-style definition coincides with [STLC_alt.v] *)
  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s, t: sort
lam_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted s t =
STLC_alt.lam_source sort arr s t

s, t: sort
lam_source_gen_oldstyle_abstracted s t =
STLC_alt.lam_source sort arr s t

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition lam_source_gen_newstyle (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 :=
    functor_compose
      (functor_compose
         (sorted_option_functorSet s)
         STLC_gen)
      (projSortToSet t ∙ hat_functorSet (s ⇒ t)).

  Definition lam_source_gen (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 :=
    ContinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctor.hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
      BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, t))) STLC_gen.

  (** the outcome of the second component of the hat functor in this construction: *)

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort

pr2 (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s t)) f) u pr) =
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           STLC_gen) (projSortToSet t))) f (pr2 pr)

  (** The lambda-abstraction constructor *)
  Definition lam_map_gen (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦lam_source_gen s t,STLC_gen⟧ :=
    CoproductIn _ _ (Coproducts_functor_precat _ _ _ _ (λ _, _)) (ii2 (s,,t)) · STLC_tau_gen.

  Definition lam_map_gen_natural (s t : sort) (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧)
    : # (pr1 (lam_source_gen s t)) f · pr1 (lam_map_gen s t) ξ' = pr1 (lam_map_gen s t) ξ · # (pr1 STLC_gen) f
    := nat_trans_ax (lam_map_gen s t) ξ ξ' f.

σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s, t: sort
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
u: sort
pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s t)) f) u
· pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s t) ξ') u =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s t) ξ) u
· pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) u

           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     (pre_comp_functor
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s)))))))))
        STLC_gen ξ))

      
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s: sort
ξ: sortToSet
STLC_gen_ctx_sort (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) (s ⇒ s)

app_source_gen s ?Goal
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1 (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) s

      
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s: sort
ξ: sortToSet
pr1
  (projSortToC sort Hsort SET
     (pr2
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1 (arity sort STLC_Sig (inl (s,, s)))))))
     (pre_comp_functor
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inl (s,, s)))))))) STLC_gen
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))))

           (pr2
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inl (s,, s))))))))

Church_gen_body (S n) ξ =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))
       :
       pr1
         (pr1 (Id (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s)))),,
   idpath s,, Church_gen_body n ξ)

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

n: nat

Church_gen_body (S n) ξ =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))
       :

            (s ⇒ s)))),,
   idpath s,, Church_gen_body n ξ)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s: sort
ξ: sortToSet
body: STLC_gen_ctx_sort
  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s) s
lam_source_gen ?Goal ?Goal0
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s)))))))) ξ)
  (s ⇒ s)

arr: sort → sort → sort

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
s: sort
ξ: sortToSet
body: STLC_gen_ctx_sort
  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s) s
pr1
  (projSortToC sort Hsort SET
     (pr2
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1 (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
     (pre_comp_functor
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))) STLC_gen
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)))

      exact body.
    Defined.

    Definition Church_gen (n : nat) (ξ : sortToSet) : STLC_gen_ctx_sort ξ ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s))
      := Church_gen_header ξ (Church_gen_body n ξ).

  End Church.

  Section Church_functor.

pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
→ pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
    s

        exact (pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                      (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                         (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s).
    Defined.

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

is_functor Church_gen_body_target_data

s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ s
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                    f))) s))) ξ ξ (identity ξ) s elem =
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                    f))) s)) ξ) s elem

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ s
nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
  (λ s : sort,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
              (identity ξ)))) s) s elem =
identity
  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 STLC_gen
             (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                   f))) s))) ξ) s elem

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

ξ: sortToSet
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ s
make_nat_trans
  (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
     (λ s : sort,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
        s))
  (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
     (λ s : sort,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
        s))
  (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
              (identity ξ)))) z)
  (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                 (identity ξ)))) z)) s elem =
identity
  (((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 STLC_gen
             (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 STLC_gen
                (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 STLC_gen
                (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                   f))) z)
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                   (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                         (z ⇒ z)) f))) z)))) ξ) s elem

(g : sortToSet ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# Church_gen_body_target_data (f · g) =
# Church_gen_body_target_data f
· # Church_gen_body_target_data g

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
# Church_gen_body_target_data (f · g) s ~
(# Church_gen_body_target_data f
 · # Church_gen_body_target_data g) s

 · pr2 Church_gen_body_target_data ξ2 ξ3 g) s elem

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr2
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToSet,
      functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                    f))) s))) ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) s elem =
(pr2
   (make_functor_data
      (λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                     f))) s))) ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     (make_functor_data
        (λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                    (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                          (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) ξ2 ξ3 g)
  s elem

g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧

elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         s)),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
         s))) ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) s elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 STLC_gen
             (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                   f))) s))) ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         s)),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
      (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
         z)
      (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                     f))) z)))) ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) s elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 STLC_gen
             (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     make_nat_trans
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 STLC_gen
                (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
       (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
          (λ s : sort,
           pr1
             (pr1 STLC_gen
                (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                   f))) z)
       (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                   (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                         (z ⇒ z)) f))) z)))) ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       make_nat_trans
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
         (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                     f))) z)
         (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
            (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (z ⇒ z)) f))) z)))) ξ2 ξ3 g)
  s elem

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr2
  ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
    functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
      (λ s : sort,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         s)),,
   (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
    (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
       z),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
         z))) ξ1 ξ3 (f · g) s elem =
(pr2
   ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
     functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
       (λ s : sort,
        pr1
          (pr1 STLC_gen
             (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
    (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
        z),,
     is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                   f))) z))) ξ1 ξ2 f
 · pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        pr1
          (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                   f))) z),,
       is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
         (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                     f))) z))) ξ2 ξ3 g) s elem

arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
  pr1
    (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
       (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
             (f · g)))) z),,
 is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
   (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
    pr1
      (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
         (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
               (f · g)))) z)) s elem =
(((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
     z),,
  is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
    (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
       z))
 · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) g)))
       z),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) g)))
         z))) s elem

elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr1
  ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
    pr1
      (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
         (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
               (f · g)))) z),,
   is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                 (f · g)))) z)) s elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
       z),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
         z))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1

            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) g)))

        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                    g))) z))) s elem

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

ξ1, ξ2, ξ3: sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ1, ξ2 ⟧
g: sortToSet ⟦ ξ2, ξ3 ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
elem: Church_gen_body_target_data ξ1 s
pr1
  (# STLC_gen
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))
   · # STLC_gen
       (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) g))) s
  elem =
pr1
  (((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     pr1
       (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
          (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
             (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
       z),,
    is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
      (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
         z))
   · ((λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
       pr1
         (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
            (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) g)))
         z),,
      is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                    g))) z))) s elem

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Definition Church_gen_body_target : sortToSet2 := _,, Church_gen_body_target_data_ok.

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
?b = Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data 0 ξ' s tt
 apply pathsinv0, (STLC_eta_gen_natural'_ppointwise _ _
                                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                                    (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))
                                 s (inl (idpath s,, tt))). 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
(Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data 0 ξ
 · # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f) s tt =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (sorted_option_functorSet s
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ))) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

        apply idpath.

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
aux:= (λ (s0 : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
 (_ : pr1 (pr1 (pr1 TsortToSet) s0)),
 Church_gen_body s0 (S n) ξ)
:
∏ x : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
SET ⟦ pr1 (pr1 TsortToSet) x,
pr1 (pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ) x ⟧: ∏ x : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
SET ⟦ pr1 (pr1 TsortToSet) x,
pr1 (pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ) x ⟧
therhs:= Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data (S n) ξ' s tt: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ' s
pr1 (# (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ')

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

Church_gen_body s n ξ'

     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (make_functor_data
        (λ ξ : sortToSet,
         functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
        (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
         (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
         nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
           (λ s : sort,
            pr1
              (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                    (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                          (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) f) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# (make_functor_data
           (λ ξ : sortToSet,
            functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
              (λ s : sort,
               pr1
                 (pr1 STLC_gen
                    (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
           (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
            (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
            nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
              (λ s : sort,
               pr1
                 (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                    (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                       (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                             (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

ξ, ξ': sortToSet

· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                     f))) s))) f) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
          functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
         (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
          (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
          nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (pr2
     ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
       functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
      (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet) (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
       nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
         (λ s : sort,
          pr1
            (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
               (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))
                     f))) s))) ξ ξ' f) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
          functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
         (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
          (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
          nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
     (λ s : sort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
        s)) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
          functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
         (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
          (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
          nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (s ⇒ s)) f))) s))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
     (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
        (λ s : sort,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s))
     (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      pr1
        (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z)) f)))
        z)
     (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
        (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
         pr1
           (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                 (# (sorted_option_functorSet (z ⇒ z))
                    f))) z))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
          functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
         (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
          (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
          make_nat_trans
            (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
               (λ s : sort,
                pr1
                  (pr1 STLC_gen
                     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
                  s))
            (functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
               (λ s : sort,
                pr1
                  (pr1 STLC_gen
                     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
                  s))
            (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (z ⇒ z)) f))) z)
            (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
               (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                pr1
                  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                        (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                              (...)) f))) z)))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# ((λ ξ : sortToSet,
          functor_path_pregroupoid Hsort
            (λ s : sort,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,
         (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToSet)
          (f : sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
          (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           pr1
             (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                   (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                         (z ⇒ z)) f))) z),,
          is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory
            (λ z : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             pr1
               (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
                  (# (sorted_option_functorSet z)
                     (# (sorted_option_functorSet
                           (z ⇒ z)) f))) z))) f) s
     (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

     (Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)

     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)

         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)

   idpath s,,

             pr1

                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s)),,

  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)

· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s (Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        (** now begins the naturality reasoning *)

     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ'))) s
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s (Church_gen_body s n ξ))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ) =
(idpath s,,
 pr1
   (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
   (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
idpath s,,
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (Church_gen_body s n ξ)

pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s
     ((idpath s,,

         (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
