→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose STLC_gen
           (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose STLC_gen
           (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

ξ, ξ': sortToSet

IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) 
        (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) 
        (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
        (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr2
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))
 apply idpath.

· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =

s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))

     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr2
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)

         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)

        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))
 apply pathsinv0, (STLC_eta_gen_natural'_ppointwise _ _
                                     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
                                        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
                                     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))). 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) ξ)))
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

            apply idpath.
        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
IHn: Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ
· # (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f =
Church_gen_body_sortToSet_data n ξ'
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
     s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,, Church_gen_body s n ξ)) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (Church_gen_body s n ξ)
 apply app_source_gen_mor_pr2.
    Qed. (* slow *)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

global_element TsortToSet2 Church_gen_body_target

ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
(# (pr1 Church_gen_body_target) f
 · Church_gen_header_sortToSet_data ξ') s body =
(Church_gen_header_sortToSet_data ξ
 · # (pr1
        (functor_compose STLC_gen
           (projSortToSetvariable
              (λ s : sort, (s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)))) f) s
  body

      
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
(pr1
   (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
      (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
         [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
            (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
         [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
            (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
         (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
            BinCoproductsHSET)
         (constant_functor
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
            hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
            hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
            (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
               TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
               BinCoproductsHSET)
            (constant_functor
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)))
            Id ξ)
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
               BinCoproductsHSET)
            (constant_functor
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)))
            Id ξ')
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
            (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
               BinCoproductsHSET)
            (constant_functor
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
               hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
               (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                  TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)))
            Id ξ ξ' f))) s
 · (λ body : pr1
               (pr1 STLC_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s,
    Church_gen_header s ξ' body)) body =
((λ body : pr1
             (pr1 STLC_gen
                (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s,
  Church_gen_header s ξ body)
 · pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)) body

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
pr2 (pr2 hset_precategory_data)
  (pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
     s)
  (pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
     s) (pr1 (STLC_gen ξ') ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
              (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
           [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
              (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
           (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
              BinCoproductsHSET)
           (constant_functor
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
              hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
              hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
              (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ')
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f))) s)
  (λ body : pr1
              (pr1 STLC_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s,
   Church_gen_header s ξ' body) body =
pr2 (pr2 hset_precategory_data)
  (pr1 (pr1 STLC_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
     s) (pr1 (STLC_gen ξ) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))
  (pr1 (STLC_gen ξ') ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))
  (λ body : pr1
              (pr1 STLC_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s,
   Church_gen_header s ξ body)
  (pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)) body
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
Church_gen_header s ξ'
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
           [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
              (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
           [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
              (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
           (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
              BinCoproductsHSET)
           (constant_functor
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
              hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
              hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
              (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ')
           (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
              (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
                 BinCoproductsHSET)
              (constant_functor
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                    (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
                 hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
                 (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
                    (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f))) s body) =
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen_header s ξ body)

      (** the following for better readability *)

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f): [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
 make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
   (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
     make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
       (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
     make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
       (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

       BinCoproductsHSET)

       [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

          (λ c : sort, idpath c)

          (λ c : sort, idpath c)
          (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

             SET TerminalHSET

             (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ),

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
Church_gen_header s ξ'
  (pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen_header s ξ body)

      
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,

         make_dirprod

           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body)) =
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body)) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ')
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f): [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

   (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr2
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body)) =
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) 
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)

           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET

              (pr1

pr1
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)

                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
        BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod

           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
        BinCoproductsHSET)

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr2
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body)) =
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

     BinCoproductsHSET)

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET

           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f): [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

   (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

       (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
       (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

       BinCoproductsHSET)

       [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1

                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)

   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) = ?b
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor

?b =
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) 
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
?b =
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body)))
 apply pathsinv0, lam_source_gen_mor_pr2.

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

?b =
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)
        (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)))) f
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)
        (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)))) f

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s

pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

           (pr1

                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))

   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =

        (functor_compose

     f) (s ⇒ s)

                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort

sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

     BinCoproductsHSET)

BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

?b =
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

        
sort: hSet

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,

        has_homsets_HSET]

?b =
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET

BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     BinCoproductsHSET)

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     ξ) (s ⇒ s)
?b =
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s) thearg

             
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort

sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
