sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     ξ) (s ⇒ s)
?t1 =
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
 apply pathsinv0, sortToSet2_comp_on_mor. }
        
sort: hSet

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     BinCoproductsHSET)

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
  (s ⇒ s)

     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ')
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ ξ' f): [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
 make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
   (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
⟦ BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

    [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

             SET TerminalHSET

             (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ),
BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
?b =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

?b =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))
 apply lam_map_gen_natural_ppointwise. 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
  (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort SET
     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

       (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

        SET BinCoproductsHSET)

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]

         make_dirprod

        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET

pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) ξ'))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
     (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     BinCoproductsHSET)
  (constant_functor
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,

        hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body =

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]
     (SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort
        SET BinCoproductsHSET)
     (constant_functor
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,
        has_homsets_HSET]
        (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET
           (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ') ⟧
pr1
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
     (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =

     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))

pr2
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body) =
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f))
     (s ⇒ s) (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET]
f: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, SET] ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
body: pr1 Church_gen_body_target ξ s
theuglyxi:= BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

     BinCoproductsHSET)

     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]

        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id

          hset_precategory,
          has_homsets_HSET]
          (option_fun_summand sort Hsort
             SET TerminalHSET
             CoproductsHSET 
             (s ⇒ s))) Id ξ),

  [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
     (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0), SET]

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
        (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
     hset_precategory, has_homsets_HSET]
     (option_fun_summand sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET CoproductsHSET s)) Id
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob
     [(sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)

           (λ c : sort, idpath c)
           (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0),
        hset_precategory,

pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) theuglyxi) s body =
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           STLC_gen) (projSortToSet s)))
  (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s))) f)
  (pr2 (idpath (s ⇒ s),, body))

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Definition Church_gen_header_sortToSet : sortToSet2⟦Church_gen_body_target,
         functor_compose STLC_gen (projSortToSetvariable (fun s => (s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s)))⟧
      := _,, Church_gen_header_sortToSet_data_ok.

     Definition Church_gen_sortToSet (n : nat) : global_element TsortToSet2
           (functor_compose STLC_gen (projSortToSetvariable (fun s => (s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s))))
      := Church_gen_body_sortToSet n · Church_gen_header_sortToSet.


     (** this makes superfluous the lengthy definitions below that are kept for comparison *)

    
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ: sortToSet
global_element TsortToSet
  (pr1
     (functor_compose STLC_gen
        (projSortToSetvariable
           (λ s : sort, (s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))) ξ)

pr2 (pr2 hset_precategory_data) unitHSET
  (pr1 (STLC_gen ξ) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))
  (pr1 (STLC_gen ξ') ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s))
  (λ _ : unit, Church_gen s n ξ)
  (pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)) tt =

  (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) =

arr: sort → sort → sort

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
        (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
        (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  sort Hsort SET

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

pr2

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

?b =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
        (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) = ?b
 apply lam_source_gen_mor_pr2. 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)
        (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)))) f
  (pr2
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
        (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

# (pr1
     (functor_compose

  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)
        (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)))) f
  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) = ?b

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s) (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt))): STLC_gen (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) (s ⇒ s)
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s) = ?t2

  (s ⇒ s)

  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s n ξ) = Church_gen s n ξ'
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) = Church_gen s (S n) ξ'

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 1 ξ) = Church_gen s 1 ξ'
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) = 
Church_gen s (S n) ξ'
IHn0: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s n ξ) = Church_gen s n ξ'
→ pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
    (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) =
  Church_gen s (S n) ξ'
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s (S (S n)) ξ) =
Church_gen s (S (S n)) ξ'

sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 1 ξ) = Church_gen s 1 ξ'
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (ChurchOne_gen s ξ) = ChurchOne_gen s ξ'

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (# (pr1 STLC_gen) f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...))))))) ξ')))
        s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1 (pr1 (lam_map_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s)) ξ')
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...))))))) ξ')))
        s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
  ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...))))))) ξ)))
        s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((...),, (...))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))

arr: sort → sort → sort

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                        (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig (...))))))
                    ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr2
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (...))))))) ξ'))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))

          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...))))))) ξ')))
        s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))
 apply idpath.
          
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr2
  (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...))))))) ξ')))
        s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))
 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

            
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) = ?b
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
         (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
