σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1 (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen (s ⇒ s) (s ⇒ s))) f)
     ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) = ?b
 apply lam_source_gen_mor_pr2.

projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)
        (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)))) f
  (pr2
     (idpath ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
        (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
         pr1
           (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (...)))))) ξ))) s
           ((idpath s,,
             pr1
               (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                  (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
               (s ⇒ s)
               (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
            idpath s,,
            pr1
              (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
                 (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
              (inl (idpath s,, tt)))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig

              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen

         pr1

  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)

   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
         (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) STLC_gen)

                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1

                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))

          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen

  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)

        (pr1

                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

            
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig

      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2

                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) = ?b

  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

              (pr2

      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
           CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
              CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     ξ) (s ⇒ s)
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s) thearg = ?b

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) (s ⇒ s)

   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)

           CoproductsHSET

              (pr1

                        (inr (s,, s)))))))

                        (arity sort STLC_Sig

                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))

       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     ξ) (s ⇒ s)
SET
⟦ pr1
    (pr1
       (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
          TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
          CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen) ξ)
    (s ⇒ s),
pr1
  (pr1
     (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
        TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen) ξ') (s ⇒ s) ⟧

       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
         (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
     ξ) (s ⇒ s)
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ STLC_gen))
     f) (s ⇒ s) = ?t2

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?t2
  (pr1
     (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (...,, ...))))))) ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (lam_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ')) (s ⇒ s)
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
         (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET 
                 (s ⇒ s))) f)) 
     (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (...,, ...))))))) ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr2
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
         (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))

sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
   pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ'))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt))))
 apply idpath.

arr: sort → sort → sort

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)

              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET

                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))

                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2

                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

               
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) = ?b
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
      (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2

     (# (pr1 (lam_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) (s ⇒ s)
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) = ?b
 apply lam_source_gen_mor_pr2. 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           STLC_gen) (projSortToSet s)))
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
           CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)
  (pr2
     (idpath (s ⇒ s),,
      pr1
        (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr (s,, s)))))))
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (...,, ...)))))))
                 ξ))) s
        ((idpath s,,
          pr1
            (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
               (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
            (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
         idpath s,,
         pr1
           (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
              (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
           (inl (idpath s,, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
# (pr1
     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           STLC_gen) (projSortToSet s)))
  (# (pr1
        (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
           CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
      (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

     (functor_compose
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)

         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1

           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose (sorted_option_functorSet s)
           STLC_gen))
     (# (pr1
           (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
              CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)

                          (inr (s,, s)))))))

                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig

     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET

                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig

           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort

ξ, ξ': sortToSet

IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s ∙ STLC_gen))
     (# (pr1
           (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
              CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET

                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

arr: sort → sort → sort

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s ∙ STLC_gen))
     (# (pr1
           (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
              CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) = ?b

  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
thearg:= pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET
           TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
           CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
      (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt))): STLC_gen
  (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (pr1
                 (arity sort STLC_Sig
                    (inr (s,, s)))))))
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig
                       (inr
                        ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
        ξ)) s
pr1
  (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s ∙ STLC_gen))
     (# (pr1
           (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
              CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f)) s = ?t2
 apply sortToSet2_comp_on_mor. 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr (s,, s)))))))
           (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
              BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr2
                       (pr1
                          (arity sort STLC_Sig
                             (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
              ξ))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
      (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
   idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'

  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (pr1
           (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
              TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET

                    CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s

         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)

      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (pr1 (app_map_gen s s)
     (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
        BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (pr2
                 (pr1
                    (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr (s,, s)))))))
        (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
           BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (pr1
                       (arity sort STLC_Sig
                          (inr ((s ⇒ s),, (s ⇒ s))))))))
           ξ'))) s
  ((idpath s,,
    pr1
      (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
         (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)

   idpath s,,

        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) s

f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort

  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'

  (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))

   pr1

     s (inl (idpath s,, tt))) =
(idpath s,,

   (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
   (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  s (inl (idpath s,, tt))

     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))

pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose STLC_gen
           (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s) ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
  (pr1
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s))
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

                  
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) 
        (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig
                        (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                        (pr2
                        (pr1
                        (arity sort STLC_Sig (inr ...))))))
                    ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) 
        (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET 
                       (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET 
                       (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
        (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr2
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) 
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)

σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))
 apply idpath.

         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)

                          (pr2

                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)

                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,

        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))

      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr2
  (idpath s,,
   pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
     (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT

  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET

     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) = ?b
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))

  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
