ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
?b =
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))
 apply pathsinv0, (STLC_eta_gen_natural'_ppointwise _ _
                                               (# (sorted_option_functorSet s) (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))
                                               (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))). 
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (CoproductOfArrows (s = s) SET
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (option_list sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
                 BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (pr1
                             (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                (inr (s,, s)))))))
                 (option_list sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET
                    (pr1
                       (pr1
                          (pr2
                             (pr1
                                (arity sort STLC_Sig
                                   (inr ...)))))) ξ)))))
     (CoproductsHSET (s = s) (Hsort s s)
        (λ _ : s = s,
         projSortToSet (s ⇒ s)
           (STLC_gen
              (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s)
                 (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s)) ξ')))))
     (λ _ : s = s,
      # (projSortToSet (s ⇒ s))
        (# STLC_gen
           (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
              (# (pr1
                    (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort
                       SET TerminalHSET
                       BinCoproductsHSET
                       CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))))
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
        (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f)))
  (s ⇒ s)
  (pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (sorted_option_functorSet s
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ)))
     (s ⇒ s) (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt))))

                      apply idpath.
               
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1 (app_source_gen s s))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (pr1
                 (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  s (inl (idpath s,, tt))

ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr1
  (# (pr1
        (functor_compose STLC_gen
           (projSortToSet s ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
     (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
        (# (pr1
              (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                 TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                 CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
  (pr2
     ((idpath s,,
       pr1
         (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
            (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
         (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)))),,
      idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
idpath s,,
pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  s (inl (idpath s,, tt))

θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1
           (functor_compose STLC_gen
              (projSortToSet s ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (pr1
                 (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) = ?b

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet

pr1
  (pr1 STLC_eta_gen (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ' (s ⇒ s)) s))
  s (inl (idpath s,, tt))

sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category

  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet

  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2

  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s 0 ξ) = Church_gen s 0 ξ'
pr2
  (pr1
     (# (pr1
           (functor_compose STLC_gen
              (projSortToSet s ∙ hat_functorSet s)))
        (# (pr1 (sorted_option_functorSet s))
           (# (pr1
                 (sorted_option_functor sort Hsort SET
                    TerminalHSET BinCoproductsHSET
                    CoproductsHSET (s ⇒ s))) f))) s
     (idpath s,,
      pr1
        (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
           (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        (inl (idpath s,, tt)))) =
pr1
  (# (pr1 STLC_gen)
     (# (sorted_option_functorSet s)
        (# (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s)) f))) s
  (pr1
     (pr1 STLC_eta_gen
        (sorted_option_functorSet s
           (sorted_option_functorSet (s ⇒ s) ξ))) s
     (inl (idpath s,, tt)))

                      apply idpath.
        
sort: hSet
arr: sort → sort → sort
sortToSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSetSet:= SortIndexing.sortToSetSet sort Hsort: category
sortToSet2:= SortIndexing.sortToSet2 sort Hsort: category
projSortToSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.projSortToSet
  sort Hsort: sort → sortToSetSet
projSortToSetvariable:= projSortToCvariable sort Hsort
  SET: (sort → sort) → sortToSet2
hat_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.hat_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort → SET ⟶ sortToSet
sorted_option_functorSet:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt.sorted_option_functorSet
  sort Hsort: sort
→ sortToSet ⟶ sortToSet
θSTLC:= MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToStrength'
  sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET BinProductsHSET
  BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig: MultiSorted_actegorical.pointedstrengthfromselfaction_CAT
  sort Hsort SET
  (MultiSortedMonadConstruction_actegorical.MultiSortedSigToFunctor'
     sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET
     BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET
     CoproductsHSET STLC_Sig)
σind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σind sort Hsort
  STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σcoind:= MultiSortedEmbeddingIndCoindHSET.σcoind sort
  Hsort STLC_Sig: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
σ: SigmaMonoid θSTLC
n: nat
ξ, ξ': sortToSet
f: sortToSet ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
IHn: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) = 
Church_gen s (S n) ξ'
IHn0: pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s n ξ) = Church_gen s n ξ'
→ pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
    (Church_gen s (S n) ξ) =
  Church_gen s (S n) ξ'
pr1 (# STLC_gen f) ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ s ⇒ s)
  (Church_gen s (S (S n)) ξ) =
Church_gen s (S (S n)) ξ'

          admit.
    Abort.

(*   Definition old_Church_gen_sortToSet (n : nat) : global_element TsortToSet2
                                                 (functor_compose STLC_gen (projSortToSetvariable (fun s => (s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s)))).
    Proof.
      use make_global_element_functor_precat.
      - exact (old_Church_gen_sortToSet_data n).
      - exact (old_Church_gen_sortToSet_data_ok n).
    Defined.
*)

  End Church_functor.

End IndAndCoind.

Definition STLC_ctx_sort_ind (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : UU
  := STLC_gen_ctx_sort σind ξ s.
Definition STLC_ctx_sort_coind (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : UU
  := STLC_gen_ctx_sort σcoind ξ s.

Definition STLC_ind : sortToSet2 := STLC_gen σind.
Definition STLC_coind : sortToSet2 := STLC_gen σcoind.

Definition STLC_eta_ind : sortToSet2⟦Id,STLC_ind⟧ := STLC_eta_gen σind.
Definition STLC_eta_coind : sortToSet2⟦Id,STLC_coind⟧ := STLC_eta_gen σcoind.

Definition STLC_tau_ind : STLC_Functor_H STLC_ind --> STLC_ind  := SigmaMonoid_τ θSTLC σind.
Definition STLC_tau_coind : STLC_Functor_H STLC_coind --> STLC_coind  := SigmaMonoid_τ θSTLC σcoind.

Definition app_source_ind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 := app_source_gen σind s t.
Definition app_map_ind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦app_source_ind s t,STLC_ind⟧ := app_map_gen σind s t.
Definition lam_source_ind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 := lam_source_gen σind s t.
Definition lam_map_ind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦lam_source_ind s t,STLC_ind⟧ := lam_map_gen σind s t.

Definition app_source_coind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 := app_source_gen σcoind s t.
Definition app_map_coind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦app_source_coind s t,STLC_coind⟧ := app_map_gen σcoind s t.
Definition lam_source_coind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2 := lam_source_gen σcoind s t.
Definition lam_map_coind (s t : sort) : sortToSet2⟦lam_source_coind s t,STLC_coind⟧ := lam_map_gen σcoind s t.


(** get a handle on the recursion principles *)

(** the initial algebra *)
Definition STLC_ind_IA : Initial (FunctorAlg STLC_Functor_Id_H)
  := DatatypeOfMultisortedBindingSig_CAT sort Hsort SET TerminalHSET InitialHSET BinProductsHSET
       BinCoproductsHSET (fun s s' => ProductsHSET (s=s')) CoproductsHSET (EsortToSet2 sort Hsort)
       (ColimsHSET_of_shape nat_graph) STLC_Sig.
(** notice that this is only the initial algebra and not the initial sigma monoid *)

(** the final coalgebra *)
Definition STLC_coind_FC : Terminal (CoAlg_category STLC_Functor_Id_H)
  := coindCodatatypeOfMultisortedBindingSig_CAT sort Hsort HSET TerminalHSET
         BinProductsHSET BinCoproductsHSET CoproductsHSET (LimsHSET_of_shape conat_graph)
         I_coproduct_distribute_over_omega_limits_HSET STLC_Sig is_univalent_HSET.

Section Church.
(** This section compiled when it was commented out so as to avoid [Admitted]. *)

(*
  Definition ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet : global_element TsortToSet2 (Church_gen_body_target σcoind).
  Proof.
    (** has to use [STLC_coind_FC] in the right way *)
  Admitted.

  Definition ChurchInfinity_body (ξ : sortToSet) (s: sort) : STLC_gen_ctx_sort σcoind (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s) s.
  Proof.
    exact (pr1 ((pr1 ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet) ξ) s tt).
  Defined.

  Definition ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet_rec_eq_statement (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : UU :=
    ChurchInfinity_body ξ s =
      pr1 (pr1 (app_map_coind s s) (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) s
        ((idpath s,,
            pr1 (pr1 STLC_eta_coind (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)
            (inr (inl (idpath (s ⇒ s),, tt)) : pr1 (pr1 (Id (ctx_ext (ctx_ext ξ (s ⇒ s)) s)) (s ⇒ s)))),,
           idpath s,, ChurchInfinity_body ξ s).

  Lemma ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet_rec_eq (ξ : sortToSet) (s : sort) : ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet_rec_eq_statement ξ s.
  Proof.
  Admitted.

  Definition ChurchInfinity_sortToSet : global_element TsortToSet2
           (functor_compose STLC_coind (projSortToSetvariable (fun s => (s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s))))
      := ChurchInfinity_body_sortToSet · (Church_gen_header_sortToSet σcoind).

  Definition ChurchInfinity (s : sort) (ξ : sortToSet) : STLC_ctx_sort_coind ξ ((s ⇒ s) ⇒ (s ⇒ s)).
  Proof.
    exact (pr1 ((pr1 ChurchInfinity_sortToSet) ξ) s tt).
  Defined.
*)
End Church.

End A.
